# Rubic API
> Unified cross-chain and on-chain swap API. Aggregates liquidity from 
> multiple DEXes and bridges across EVM and non-EVM blockchains.
 
Important notes:
- This API does NOT auto-execute transactions. Integrators must sign and send.
- Quotes are indicative and may change before swap execution.
- Supports EVM, Solana, TON, Tron, Bitcoin, and Sui chains.
 
## Core Documentation
- [Overview](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-docs/about/overview): What the API does and core integration flow
- [Referrer & Rate Limits](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-docs/about/referrer): Auth and rate limit info
- [Swagger / OpenAPI](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-docs/about/open-api): Full API schema
 
## Quick Start (Agents)
- [Request Quote](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-docs/router/request-quote): Get swap routes and output amounts
- [Get Transaction](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-docs/router/get-transaction): Get execution data for a route
- [Transaction Status](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-docs/router/transaction-status): Poll for cross-chain status
 
## Reference
- [Get Chains List](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-reference/info/get-chains-list): All supported blockchains
- [Get Available Providers](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-reference/info/get-available-providers): DEXes and bridges
 
## Integration Examples
- [Swaps from EVM](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/docs/api-docs/integration-examples/swaps-from-evm)
- [Swaps from Solana](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/docs/api-docs/integration-examples/swaps-from-solana)
- [Swaps via Deposit](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/docs/api-docs/integration-examples/swaps-via-deposit)
 
## Optional
- [Prevent Dangerous Routes](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-docs/guides/dangerous-routes)
- [Handling Amount Changes](https://dev-docs.rubic.exchange/api-docs/guides/handling-amount-change)
